summary: Dashboard metric logic and drill-down behavior testing - All features verified. Tournament 'Active' now correctly shows 2 (fix confirmed). Match Status counters (Live ora=26, Inconsistenti=40, Senza risultato=0) navigate to dedicated matches drill-down page (render_matches). Drill-down page shows correct columns, 'Problema' column for inconsistent filter, back button, and filter tabs. Tournament 'Pending' and 'A Rischio' counters are clickable. Predictions Activity simplified to 4 info-only KPIs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard metric fixes verified. render_matches() drill-down page accessible via navigateWith('matches',{filter:'live/inconsistent/no_result'}). Backend /api/admin/matches-overview endpoint returns correct data with issue descriptions for inconsistent filter.
